---
title: "LOGO_CEIGRAS"
author: "CEIGRAS"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Setup

```{r}
#| label: setup

source("https://inkaverse.com/setup.r")
```

## Field-book

```{r}
#> Google fonts: https://fonts.google.com/
# Vina Sans

font <- c("Montserrat")
huito_fonts(font)
```

## Labels

```{r}
label <- label_layout(size = c(3.9, 0.6)
               , border_color = "blue"
               , border_width = 0.5
               ) %>%
  # Logo UNTRM
  include_image(
    value = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/EOCT-234/Practicas_2026/refs/heads/main/CEIGRAS_archivos/Logo_UNTRMpng.png"
    , size = c(2,2)
    , position = c(1.05, 0.3)
    ) %>% 
  include_text(value = "CENTRO DE INVESTIGACIÓN"
               , position = c(2.95 , 0.4)
               , size = 3.5
               , color = "#133E6B"
               , font= font[3]
               , fontface = "bold"
               ) %>% 
  include_text(value = "EN GRANOS Y SEMILLAS"
               , position = c(2.85 , 0.2)
               , size = 3.5
               , color = "#133E6B"
               , font= font[3]
               , fontface = "bold"
               )

label %>% label_print()
```

```{r}
#| eval: false
creapdf <- label %>% 
  label_print(
    mode = "c",
    paper = c(4, 0.7),
    filename = "ETIQUETA_UNTRM"
  )
```

`
```{r}
#pdf a jpg

library(pdftools)

pdf_jpg <- pdf_convert(
  "ETIQUETA_UNTRM.pdf",
  format = "jpeg",
  dpi = 600   # calidad alta
)
```

```{r}
#jgp con fondo blanco (trasnparente)
library(pdftools)

sin_fondo <- pdf_convert(
  "ETIQUETA_UNTRM.pdf",
  format = "png",
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "transparent"
)

```
